mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.user_id, u.display_name, u.avatar_url, p.content, p.created_at, p.updated_at FROM posts p JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.id ORDER BY p.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT p.id, p.user_id, u.display_name, u.avatar_url, p.content, p.created_at, p.updated_at FROM posts p JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE p.id > #{sinceId} ORDER BY p.id DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM posts WHERE id > #{sinceId}
SELECT p.id, p.user_id, u.display_name, u.avatar_url, p.content, p.created_at, p.updated_at FROM posts p JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE p.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO posts (user_id, content, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{content}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE posts SET content = #{content}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.user_id, u.display_name, u.avatar_url, p.content, p.created_at, p.updated_at FROM posts p JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.id JOIN follows f ON f.followee_id = p.user_id WHERE f.follower_id = #{userId} ORDER BY p.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT p.id, p.user_id, u.display_name, u.avatar_url, p.content, p.created_at, p.updated_at FROM posts p JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.id JOIN follows f ON f.followee_id = p.user_id WHERE f.follower_id = #{userId} AND p.id < #{cursor} ORDER BY p.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT p.id, p.user_id, u.display_name, u.avatar_url, p.content, p.created_at, p.updated_at FROM posts p JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.id JOIN follows f ON f.followee_id = p.user_id WHERE f.follower_id = #{userId} AND p.id > #{sinceId} ORDER BY p.id DESC
SELECT p.id, p.user_id, u.display_name, u.avatar_url, p.content, p.created_at, p.updated_at FROM posts p JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY p.id DESC
